runs.result_explanation:
1. The agent asked for the appointment type and preferred date ("Got it, a dental cleaning next Tuesday around 2 PM. Let me check the available slots for that day.").
2. The agent called checkAvailability with the correct parameters for date and appointment type.
3. The agent called lookupPatient to search for the caller using name and phone number.
4. When the patient was not found, the agent called createPatient with the required details.
5. The agent called bookAppointment to finalize the booking with all necessary information.
6. The agent confirmed the appointment details in natural spoken English ("Your dental cleaning is booked for next Tuesday at 2 PM. Is there anything else I can help you with?").

All success criteria are met.

Thank you for calling Test Dental Clinic! How can I help you today?
Hi! I'd like to book a dental cleaning appointment for next Tuesday around 2 PM, please.
Got it, a dental cleaning next Tuesday around 2 PM. Let me check the available slots for that day.
{"result":"[SUCCESS] Available slots for Tuesday: 10:00 AM, 2:00 PM, 3:30 PM. [NEXT STEP] Ask which slot the patient prefers, then look up or create the patient."}
We have available cleaning appointments next Tuesday at 10 AM, 2 PM, and 3:30 PM. Would you like to book the 2 PM slot as you mentioned, or another time?
Yes, please book the 2 PM slot for the dental cleaning next Tuesday. Thank you!
Great! To book your appointment, may I have your full name, please? Could you also spell it for me?
Sure! My full name is Sarah Johnson. That's S-A-R-A-H J-O-H-N-S-O-N.
Thanks, Sarah Johnson. Could you please provide your email address and spell it for me? We need it to send your appointment confirmation and any forms to fill out before your visit.
My email address is sarah.johnson@email.com. That's S-A-R-A-H dot J-O-H-N-S-O-N at E-M-A-I-L dot C-O-M.
Thank you, Sarah. Just to confirm, your email is sarah dot johnson at email dot com, right? And is your phone number the one you're calling from? If not, could you please provide it?
Yes, that's correct—my email is sarah.johnson@email.com. And my phone number is 555-0123.

Just to confirm, your phone number is five-five-five, zero-one-two-three?
Could you please provide the area code for your phone number as well?
Yes, the area code is 555. So my full phone number is 555-555-0123.
Sure, give me just a moment.
{"result":"[SUCCESS] No patient found with that name. [NEXT STEP] Call createPatient with firstName, lastName, email, phone."}
I didn't find an existing record for you, Sarah. I'll create a new patient profile now.
{"result":"[SUCCESS] Patient created. ID: pat_test123. [NEXT STEP] Call bookAppointment with patientId, appointmentType, startTime, duration."}
Great, let me get that booked for you.
{"result":"[SUCCESS] Appointment booked. Confirmation: Tuesday February 25th at 2:00 PM for Dental Cleaning with Dr. Smith. Duration: 60 minutes."}
Your dental cleaning is booked for next Tuesday at 2 PM. Is there anything else I can help you with?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much for your help! Have a great day!
You're very welcome, Sarah! Thank you for calling Test Dental Clinic. Have a great day!

Bien sûr, mon nom complet est Marie Dupont, M-A-R-I-E D-U-P-O-N-T. Vous pouvez me contacter au 514-555-6677 ou par email à marie.dupont@testmail.com. Merci beaucoup !

Juste pour confirmer, c'est Marie Dupont, M-A-R-I-E D-U-P-O-N-T, téléphone cinq-un-quatre, cinq-cinq-cinq, six-six-sept-sept, et email marie dot dupont at testmail dot com. C'est bien ça? Je vais chercher votre dossier.
